title: Diggus Maximus Bukkit
description: A bukkit server plugin provides compatible with DiggusMaximus.
body:
# DiggusMaximusBukkit
A bukkit server plugin aimed to make compatible the fabric client with the mod [DiggusMaximus](https://modrinth.com/mod/diggus-maximus) or [DiggusMaximusReborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/diggus-maximus-reborn).  

Requires [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/) to work.

## Permissions
- `diggusmaximus.use`
  - Permission for use, default is true.
